title: Chart colors are inconsistent

posts.author: APICaptain (Calum Klesel)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a couple of charts that have a People column in the X-axis. How can I make the same people have the same colors in the charts.

Example screenshot included below.
Two different people have a yellow line, but I would prefer each team member to have a consistent color between the different charts on the same dashboard. The different charts are referencing the same boards. The people are members of each board.

Any suggestions are welcome.

Thank you Monday.com Community
